description: The Grande Aracri 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a criminal organization based in Cutro, Calabria, Italy. Founded in the 1980s by Nicolino Grande Aracri, it expanded drug trafficking across Northern Italy and into Germany, Switzerland, and France. The clan has been involved in extortion, money laundering, and murder, and has faced numerous anti-mafia operations. In 2021, its capobastone began cooperating with authorities.
